allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\(''name'',''N/A''\)\); print\(''ID:'', d.get\(''id'',''N/A''\)\); [print\(f'' {c[""fieldName""]}: {c[""name""]} \({c[""dataTypeName""]}\)''\) for c in d.get\(''columns'',[]\)]")
